actions.script:
ec.artifactExecution.disableAuthz() File rootDir = new File(System.getProperty("moqui.runtime") ?: "runtime") File inDir = new File(rootDir, inboxPath) if (!inDir.exists()) { ec.logger.warn("Inbound dir not found: ${inDir.path}"); return }
inDir.listFiles().each { file -> if (file.isDirectory() || !file.name.endsWith(".txt")) return def content = file.text ec.service.sync().name("trade.swift.InboundSwiftServices.ingest#SwiftMessage") .parameters([rawContent: content, sourceChannel: 'SRC_DIRECTORY_POLL', sourceFileName: file.name]).call() file.delete() }
